customManagers.description: Track `# renovate: datasource=… depName=…`-annotated *_VERSION pins in the Makefile (e.g. MERMAID_CLI_VERSION).

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates so the wider community has a chance to surface regressions
Group all GitHub Actions bumps into one PR. helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests (inherited from config:best-practices) carries the `# vX.Y.Z` comment alongside the SHA so reviewers see what changed.

Hold mise aqua-tool bumps (e.g. hadolint) for a 3-day stability buffer. Renovate's mise manager resolves aqua: backends via the github-tags datasource, which sees a tag the moment it's pushed — but `mise install` downloads the GitHub *release* asset, which can publish hours-to-days later (trivy/k9s/carvel have all done this). Without the buffer a bump PR's CI 404s in the mise install step. Scoped to github-tags so it doesn't touch the java/maven core-backend pins.

Group ApacheDS bumps — the server, core-annotations, protocol-ldap, and api-ldap-codec-standalone are released in lockstep upstream and must move together to avoid runtime ClassNotFoundException at boot.
Group SLF4J bumps — api + simple binding ship together.

Group Maven build plugins used by this project (maven-shade-plugin, maven-compiler-plugin, exec-maven-plugin, maven-bundle-plugin) plus the OWASP dependency-check plugin into one PR — plugin bumps don't affect application runtime.
Group JUnit 5 Jupiter bumps — the BOM, jupiter, and jupiter-params ship together and must move in lockstep to keep Surefire's JUnit Platform Provider happy.
